problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
